title: Boy Meets the Game Centre Girl
overview: While working at an arcade, Renji strikes up a friendship with an English girl who can't speak Japanese.

title: If Pushing Doesn't Work, Try Pulling
overview: Renji's sister Aoi asks him to make her a "game center pro" before she visits the arcade with her friend Lily.

title: Where Is Your Brother?
overview: After Renji and Lily go on their date, Aoi informs Renji that she invited Lily to come over for a study party.

title: Can I Get a Minute?
overview: Lily's jealousy is ignited when a pretty girl who visits the arcade turns out to be Renji's college classmate.

title: This Is My Dad!
overview: When Lily forces Renji to walk her home on a rainy day, the two happen to run into Lily's intimidating father.

title: I Didn't Notice That at All!
overview: A new challenger shows up at the game center to compete for Renji's attention, but Lily steps in to stop her.

title: All Work and No Play Makes Hotaru a Dull Girl
overview: Hotaru checks whether her classmates are engaging in meaningful activities in the arcade.

title: Happy Birthday to You
overview: Lily invites her school friends and Renji to her birthday party and shows them how people celebrate in the UK.

title: Summer Holidays!
overview: As Lily and friends enjoy their summer vacation, new and unique guests start to appear at Renji's game center.

title: OKF Tournament
overview: The game center holds an Otokogi Koala Fighters knockout tournament that attracts a wide variety of players.

title: Homecoming
overview: Lily, Karin, and Hotaru join Renji and Aoi on a trip to visit their grandma's home up north in rural Tohoku.

title: My Feelings Haven't Changed
overview: With Grandma's love story still fresh in their minds, Lily and Renji face up to their feelings for each other.
